# next()

**Instance Method**

Asynchronously advances to the next element and returns it, or ends the sequence if there is no next element.

## Declaration

```swift
mutating func next() async throws -> ManagedAppLibrary.ManagedApps.AsyncIterator.Element?
```

## Iterating

- **ManagedAppLibrary.ManagedApps.AsyncIterator.Element**: The type of element this asynchronous sequence produces.

items.description: The type of element this asynchronous sequence produces.
